steps.title: Spot the locational cue
steps.content: The first sentence ends with “sent to the International Bureau of Weights and Measures (BIPM) in France.” The transition must show where the next action in the process occurs.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: ”There” completes the process flow: readings are sent to France, and there the metrologists assemble them. “In particular” and “For example” inappropriately introduce specificity rather than sequence, while “Conversely” falsely implies contrast. That matches choice A — A is correct.
